title: Tesy's Fantasy
description: Give your Minecraft world a fresh touch with redesigned armor, tools, mobs, and summonable legends like Herobrine
body:
![Tesy's fantasy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39b1a96bff3a3bb54674db4dada6c93d222480c8.png)

A resource pack that refreshes your Minecraft world while keeping its vanilla charm!

This pack reflects my own imaginative vision of Minecraft — a world shaped by fantasy ideas and personal creativity, yet still loyal to the familiar vanilla style.

🕷️ Dangerous Creatures

*Zombies now adapt to their surroundings with biome-based variants.

*Endermen have new variants depending on the biome.

*Witches are now Wizards, featuring illager-like faces.

*Skeletons, Strays, Boggeds, and Wither Skeletons have unique models and textures.

*Ravagers wear golden armor.

🌿 Passive Creatures

*Cows have been redesigned.

*Sheep differ between warm and cold climates.

*Chickens have been redesigned.

*Pigs have been redesigned.

*Foxes have been redesigned.

*Allay, Sniffer and Happy Ghast have new regional variants.

🌊 Changed Sea Creatures

*Squids and Glow Squids are now giant squids with new variants.

*Turtle, Salmon, Cod, and Pufferfish appear in new natural variants.

🍞 Villager Changes

*Librarian villagers now carry colorful books.

⚔️ Weapons and Tools

*The Trident has been remodeled.

*The Mace, along with all Netherite, Diamond and Iron tools and weapons, have new textures.

*All diamond gear and blocks have been transformed into purple diamond designs.

Every texture and model was crafted to reflect the way I imagine Minecraft’s world — a mix of fantasy 🧙 and reality 🌳.
This pack will continue to grow as my imagination does.

🏷️ Name-based Textures

*Herobrine / Null / Entity303 → Zombie

*Fenrir → Black Wolf

⚠️ Requires OptiFine or ETF + EMF to function properly.
